footer.desc: Check our docs or contact support.

Auth.signin_desc: Enter your credentials to access your workspace
Auth.signup_desc: Enter your email below to start your journey

PasswordReset.forgot_desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
PasswordReset.email_sent: Reset link sent! Check your email.
PasswordReset.check_spam: If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.
PasswordReset.reset_success: Password reset successfully! You can now sign in.

Pricing.offline_desc: Contact support to complete the payment.
Pricing.offline_instructions: After making the payment, send the receipt to support. Your plan will be manually activated within 24 hours.

Sessions.title: Active Sessions
Sessions.cancel_desc: The session for {name} will be ended. This action cannot be undone.

Dashboard.title: Sales Pipeline

Settings.remove_dialog_desc: Are you sure you want to remove this user? They will lose access immediately.

Settings.no_available_members: All members are already in this department
Settings.signature_desc: Automatically add your name as a signature at the end of sent messages.
Settings.feature_not_available: You don't have access to this feature. Please upgrade your plan.
Settings.delete_account_desc: Account deletion is non-reversable. Please proceed with caution.
Settings.meta_configuration_desc: Configure the Webhook in the Meta dashboard:

Settings.meta_cloud_not_installed: Meta Cloud plugin is not installed.
Settings.connect_whatsapp_desc: Scan the code to link your device
Settings.instance_already_connected_info: Instance already connected or QR Code unavailable.
Settings.confirm_delete_instance: Are you sure you want to delete the instance "{instanceName}"? This action cannot be undone.

delete_instance_dialog.title: Delete Instance
delete_instance_dialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the instance "{instanceName}"? This action cannot be undone.
delete_instance_dialog.move_contacts_desc: Before deleting, you can move the contacts from this instance to another.
delete_instance_dialog.dont_move: Don't move (contacts will be left without instance)

Settings.error_loading_instances_desc: We couldn't connect to the server. Please try again.
Settings.connections_desc: Manage your WhatsApp instances and API connections.
Settings.connect_new_instance_desc: Choose between standard WhatsApp Web or official Business API.
Settings.no_connections_yet_desc: Connect a WhatsApp number to start sending messages, building automations, and managing contacts.

sync_chats.title: Sync Conversations
sync_chats.description: Import existing WhatsApp conversations into the system. Select which conversations to import.
sync_chats.no_chats: No conversations found in this instance.

Settings.ai_agent_config_desc: Configure the brain of your automated support.
Settings.activation_status_desc: Enable or disable the AI intervention in chats.
Settings.system_instructions_desc: Define how the AI should behave, its tone, and limitations.
Settings.system_prompt_placeholder: Ex: You are a support agent for PizzaPlace. Be friendly. Your goal is to take orders...
Settings.voice_config_desc: Manage your phone numbers and call credits.
Settings.voice_my_numbers_desc: Phone numbers purchased for your team.
Settings.voice_search_prefix_placeholder: Search by area code or prefix (e.g. 212, 415...)
Settings.voice_available_numbers_desc: Choose a phone number. After purchase, you'll be redirected to checkout.
Settings.voice_no_numbers: No phone numbers yet. Purchase one to start making calls.
Settings.voice_no_available_numbers: No numbers available for this country. Try a different region.
Settings.voice_history_desc: View your recent voice call activity.
Settings.no_activity_yet_desc: When you perform actions like signing in or updating your account, they'll appear here.
Settings.time_minutes_ago: {count, plural, one {# minute} other {# minutes}} ago
Settings.time_hours_ago: {count, plural, one {# hour} other {# hours}} ago
Settings.time_days_ago: {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} ago
Settings.action_connected_whatsapp_instance: You connected a new WhatsApp instance
Settings.action_saved_contact: You saved a new contact to CRM
Settings.action_assigned_chat_to_agent: You assigned a chat to an agent
Settings.action_moved_contact_funnel_stage: You moved a contact to a new funnel stage
Settings.action_added_tag_to_contact: You added a tag to a contact
Settings.action_removed_tag_from_contact: You removed a tag from a contact
Settings.developer_api_desc: Manage API keys and view documentation.
Settings.api_keys_card_desc: Use these keys to authenticate your requests. Keep them secret.
Settings.confirm_revoke_key: Are you sure you want to revoke this key? Any application using it will stop working.
Settings.documentation_card_desc: How to use the API to send messages.
Settings.create_api_key_dialog_desc: Give your key a name to identify it later.
Settings.key_created_successfully_dialog_desc: Please copy your key now. You won't be able to see it again in full if you refresh.

Automation.new_automation_dialog_desc: Set up the basic details for your new automation flow.

Automation.subtitle: Manage your conversation flows.
Automation.sidebar_desc: Drag and drop to the canvas
Automation.control_ai_agent_desc: Control the AI Agent for this chat.
Automation.save_user_answer_desc: Save the user answer to this variable.
Automation.variable_to_use_contact_name_desc: Variable to use as Contact Name.
Automation.invalid_option_msg_placeholder: E.g. Invalid option. Please try again.
Automation.end_node_desc: This node will immediately close the automation session.

Templates.connect_waba_desc: To manage templates, you need to connect a WhatsApp Business API (WABA) instance first.
Templates.no_templates_found: No templates found for this instance.
Templates.sync_or_create_new: Sync from Meta or create a new one.
Templates.create_template_desc: Meta requires examples for all dynamic content.

Templates.media_header_handle_toast_error: Media Header requires a file handle example.
Templates.body_variable_examples_toast_error: Please provide examples for all body variables.

Admin.gateway_hint: Select which payment processor will be used for this plan.

AdminGateways.title: Payment Gateways
AdminGateways.subtitle: Enable and configure payment processors for your plans.
AdminGateways.stripe_desc: Accept credit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay and more.
AdminGateways.razorpay_desc: Accept payments via UPI, cards, wallets and netbanking in India.
AdminGateways.stripe_webhook_step1: 1. Go to Stripe Dashboard → Developers → Webhooks.
AdminGateways.stripe_webhook_step3: 3. Copy the Signing Secret and paste it in the field above.
AdminGateways.razorpay_webhook_step1: 1. Go to Razorpay Dashboard → Settings → Webhooks.
AdminGateways.razorpay_webhook_step3: 3. Set a secret, copy it and paste in the field above.
AdminGateways.offline_desc: Accept payments via bank transfer, wire or manual confirmation.
AdminGateways.offline_info_desc: The plan will be manually activated by the admin after payment confirmation. The customer will see payment instructions on the checkout page.

AdminChannels.title: Channels
AdminChannels.subtitle: Configure WhatsApp connection providers. Enable or disable channels for your platform.
AdminChannels.evolution_desc: Connect via Evolution API for WhatsApp Web (QR Code) and WABA instances.
AdminChannels.meta_cloud_desc: Connect directly to Meta WhatsApp Cloud API via Embedded Signup. No Evolution API required.
AdminChannels.meta_cloud_locked: Plugin not installed. Add the meta-cloud plugin folder to enable.
AdminChannels.env_fallback_hint: Leave blank to use environment variable

AdminVoice.title: Voice Call Settings
AdminVoice.subtitle: Manage global Twilio credentials and pricing for all teams.
AdminVoice.credentials_desc: Configure your Twilio account credentials. These are used platform-wide.
AdminVoice.twiml_app_sid_hint: Optional. Used for advanced call routing.
AdminVoice.billing_gateway_desc: Select which processor will charge for credits and numbers.
AdminVoice.pricing_credits_desc: Configure how many minutes each pack includes and the price charged to the customer.
AdminVoice.pricing_preview: The customer will see these purchase options:
AdminVoice.pricing_numbers_desc: Monthly price the customer pays to keep a phone number active.

AdminUsers.title: Users Management
AdminUsers.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
AdminUsers.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.

ChatTheme.title: Chat Theme
ChatTheme.subtitle: Customize the chat appearance for all users.
ChatTheme.background_image_desc: Upload a PNG pattern to use as the chat background. The image will be repeated to fill the area.
ChatTheme.preview_msg_3: Perfect! Let me know if you need anything.
ChatTheme.viewing_dark: Showing dark mode themes. Switch to light mode to see light variants.
ChatTheme.viewing_light: Showing light mode themes. Switch to dark mode to see dark variants.

Chat.end_automation_dialog_desc: This will close the current bot session for this contact.
Chat.type_message_placeholder: Type a message or type / for shortcuts
Chat.awaiting_customer_reply: Awaiting customer reply. Messages can only be sent after the contact responds to the template sent via Meta.
Chat.group_read_only: Groups are read-only. Messages cannot be sent from here.
Chat.invalid_phone_number_form_error: Invalid phone number. Check country code and area code.
Chat.send_failed_toast: Send failed. Check details in the form.
Chat.new_chat_dialog_desc: Start a conversation using a connected instance.
Chat.type_full_number_hint: Type a full number to select.
Chat.window_expired_title: Select a message template to reactivate the conversation
Chat.window_expired_description: To reactivate a WhatsApp conversation whose billing window has closed, you need to select and send a message template. Once your contact replies, the free text field will be available again to continue the conversation.
Chat.voice_call_confirm_subtitle: You are about to make a call to:
Chat.voice_call_recording_notice: The call will be recorded and transcribed by the system.

sync_messages.banner: This chat has no messages. Would you like to import the history?

hero.badge: ✨ New: AI Agent with Function Calling
hero.subtitle: Centralize chats, build automation flows, and scale your business with our all-in-one CRM and AI platform. No coding required.

preview.chat_1_msg: I'd like to schedule a demo
preview.demo_msg_1: Hello! I saw your pricing page and I'm interested in the Pro plan.
preview.demo_msg_2: Does it include the WhatsApp API integration?
preview.demo_ai_response: Yes, absolutely! The Pro plan includes full WhatsApp Business API access with unlimited automation flows. Would you like to schedule a quick demo?

features.title: Everything you need to scale
features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed to help you organize leads, automate conversations, and close more deals.
features.card_flow_desc: Create complex automation flows with a drag-and-drop interface. Send messages, delays, and collect data automatically.
features.card_ai_desc: Train AI agents to handle support queries, schedule appointments, and even send files using structured tools.
features.card_inbox_desc: Manage all your WhatsApp conversations in one place with a Kanban view, tags, and team assignment.
features.card_multi_desc: Connect via WhatsApp Web (Baileys) or the official WhatsApp Business API (WABA) for stability.
features.card_team_desc: Invite your team, assign roles, and distribute chats automatically to ensure fast response times.
features.card_campaigns_desc: Broadcast messages to your contact list with one click. Ideal for promotions and updates.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business needs. No hidden fees.

cta_final.title: Ready to revolutionize your support?
cta_final.subtitle: Join thousands of businesses using our platform to automate conversations and grow faster.
cta_final.disclaimer: No credit card required for trial.

main.select_chat_hint: Select a chat to view details.

AiTools.title: Function Calling (AI Tools)
AiTools.description: Create custom tools for the AI to send files or perform CRM actions automatically.
AiTools.create_description: The AI will use the description to decide when to use this tool.
AiTools.description_placeholder_combo: Ex: When the client shows interest, send the catalog and move to Negotiation stage.
AiTools.caption_placeholder: Ex: Here is our delicious menu
AiTools.confirmation_placeholder_combo: Ex: I sent the catalog and noted your interest!
AiTools.confirmation_hint: What the AI should say after executing successfully.
AiTools.actions_empty: Add at least one action using the button above.
